[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010011000 3
1 001001101 4
2 101011000 4
3 000110101 4
4 100001010 3
5 100100011 4
6 110101101 6
7 110111111 8

67 76 011011000 4
70 07 010011111 6

13 31 000000100 1
24 42 000000000 a
35 53 000000000 a
46 64 000000000 a
57 75 001010010 3

71 17 010000100 2
